title: When LLMs Read Tables Carelessly: Measuring and Reducing Data Referencing Errors
innovation_summary: When LLMs Read Tables Carelessly: Measuring and Reducing Data Referencing Errors: In this work, we present the first systematic evaluation of tabular data referencing errors across different models and tasks.
